creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made a new port.
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/japanese/newosaka-1.0-970129.tar.gz

Newosaka is the translator of Japanese text from normal Japanese to localized Japanese in Osaka Prefecture.
It's merely a joke soft. Please enjoy.
			Yukihiro Nakai<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
